base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_wave_beam — a pickup_item from 1986 metroid. Wave Beam — replaces current beam. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Wave Beam — replaces current beam; sine-wave passes through walls
